Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class JFunction

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.Function
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JFunction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Operator, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
Direct Known Subclasses:
ObserverFunction, SortDependingFunction, Transformer
public class JFunction extends Function implements Operator, Sorted
Objects of this class represent function and predicate symbols in JavaDL. Note that program variables are a separate syntactic category, and not a type of function.
As soon as there is a solution for EqualsModProofIrrelevancy, this class may be deleted.

    validTopLevelException(T term)
    Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator.

  • Method Details

    • validTopLevelException

      public <T extends Term> void validTopLevelException(T term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Overrides:
      validTopLevelException in class AbstractOperator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised
